'''''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 80''' was the eightieth issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'', released on [[July 9]], [[2003]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*The [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]]
*[[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]
*[[Jobal Naberrie/Legends|Jobal Naberrie]]
*[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] - [[Tatooine/Legends#Galactic Republic|Colonization]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] - [[Theed/Legends|Theed]] [[Palace Courtyard/Legends|Grand Plaza]]
*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Maintenance droid/Legends|Maintenance Droids]]
*[[Sensor/Legends|Sensors]]
*[[Concussion missile/Legends|Concussion Missiles]]
*[[Seltiss-2 caravel|Hutt Caravel]]
